name: 反派得意忘形型（死亡flag）
description: 反派在短暫佔據上風時的狂妄宣言，反而預示了其即將到來的覆滅。觀眾知道報應即將降臨，這種『等待打臉』的過程本身就是爽感的一部分。
tags: 製造壓迫/鋪墊反轉爽感

examples.drama_title: 💔Reborn! Family listened to my inner thoughts, scheming girl cry!#chinesedrama
examples.excerpt: My system can even defy the laws of Heaven. / I'm not afraid of a mere moral saint. / I've used up all the points in the system. / You stole the fortune of your Xie family for future generations.
examples.context: 製造壓迫/鋪墊反轉爽感
